creator: draco@marino.st
text:
Bapt,

To fix xmlada and gtkada on FreeBSD 8.x, please apply this patch after 
the full diff:

http://leaf.dragonflybsd.org/~marino/ada/fix-ada-8-series.diff

It will pull in USE_BINUTILS for FreeBSD 8, fixing the problems with the 
ports above, as discussed on IRC.

Thanks,
John
